properties.Value:
The Spell Menu gives you quick access to all of your equipped spells. Tap the spell icon or press its hotkey to select a spell, and it becomes your active cast — ready to fire the moment you press the action button.

Each spell slot displays the spell's icon, its mana cost, and a cooldown ring that fills as the ability recharges. Slots with insufficient mana are dimmed so you can read your resource state at a glance without opening any other panel.

You can swap your active spell at any time, even mid-movement. Switching does not interrupt an in-progress cast — the current cast completes first, then the newly selected spell becomes active for your next action.
